title: Configuration key gating a table and its menu item
instruction: In the sandbox model, gate a feature area behind a configuration key. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="configuration-keys"). Create: (1) a configuration key DemoModuleKey (d365fo_file objectType "configuration-key") with a Label and no parent key; (2) a table DemoGatedSetting (label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote, table group Main) with fields SettingKey (String, EDT Num, mandatory) and SettingValue (String, EDT Name), a unique alternate-key index GatedSettingIdx on SettingKey, and its ConfigurationKey property set to ConDemoModuleKey; (3) a display menu item DemoGatedSettingMI whose ConfigurationKey property is also ConDemoModuleKey, so the whole chain (key -> table -> navigation) disables together. All three objects must build with zero BP errors. NOTE: disabling the key drops the table from the synchronised schema - the case only asserts the metadata chain, it must not disable the key.
